name: startup_analysis
description: Android App Launch Performance Analysis using Perfetto Stdlib

queries.startups: INCLUDE PERFETTO MODULE android.startup.startups; INCLUDE PERFETTO MODULE android.startup.time_to_display; SELECT s.startup_id, s.package, s.startup_type, s.dur/1000000.0 as dur_ms, ttd.time_to_initial_display/1000000.0 as ttid_ms, ttd.time_to_full_display/1000000.0 as ttfd_ms FROM android_startups s LEFT JOIN android_startup_time_to_display ttd USING(startup_id)
queries.breakdown: INCLUDE PERFETTO MODULE android.startup.startup_breakdowns; SELECT reason, SUM(dur)/1000000.0 as total_dur_ms FROM android_startup_opinionated_breakdown WHERE startup_id = {startup_id} GROUP BY reason
queries.thread_states: INCLUDE PERFETTO MODULE android.startup.startups; SELECT state, SUM(ts.dur)/1000000.0 as total_dur_ms FROM thread_state ts JOIN thread t ON ts.utid = t.utid JOIN android_startups s ON ts.ts >= s.ts AND ts.ts <= s.ts + s.dur WHERE t.name LIKE '%main%' AND s.startup_id = {startup_id} GROUP BY state
queries.cpu_freq: INCLUDE PERFETTO MODULE android.startup.startups; SELECT AVG(value)/1000.0 as avg_freq_mhz FROM counter c JOIN cpu_counter_track t ON c.track_id = t.id JOIN android_startups s ON c.ts >= s.ts AND c.ts <= s.ts + s.dur WHERE t.name = 'cpufreq' AND s.startup_id = {startup_id}
